source_note: Application of Southwestern Electric Power Company (SWEPCO) for Authorization of a System Improvement Plan (SIP), including related rate recovery through Fuel Adjustment Clause (FAC) beginning June 1, 2026. Plan covers grid hardening (629 line-miles) and vegetation management (6,095 line-miles) across 11 Louisiana parishes. Filed November 24, 2025, published for intervention December 5, 2025. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: LPSC public docket portal, Docket U-37794, file sh4kA6z+3bk= (lpscpubvalence.lpsc.louisiana.gov).
